author: tmiychao
content:
If you feel the proposal is ready, you can open a PR to add it to the repo. I will post review there or if you are still not sure about it, you can send it to me. 
The project presentations are on Wednesday office hours, you can sign up under the issue. 
Reach out to me to discuss what do you need and I can connect you with mentors
